10 PVC Split Jerk
10 Strict Press

hypertrophy.reasoning: Address posterior chain weaknesses and shoulder balance after heavy pressing and squatting.

Warm-up | Activation & Mobilisation Drills:
1 round
30sec e/s PVC Shoulder Opener
5 PVC Around the Worlds each way
5 PVC Pass Throughs

Split Jerk | 3x3 | * Pause in catch
* Punch the ceiling | E3MOM 21min
BUILD 3 Sets
00:00 3 @ 50%
03:00 3 @ 60%
06:00 3 @ 70%
09:00 3 @ 80%
HOLD 3 Sets
12:00 3 @ 85%

18:00 3 @ 85%

00:00 5 @ 50%

HOLD 4 Sets

10:00 3 @ 75%

siri_text: Monday's workout. Strength: Split Jerk, 3 by 3 at 85 percent. Strength: Back Squat, 4 by 3 at 75 percent. Metcon: Partner Angie. Workout: Partner Angie, You-go-I-Go, 100 Pull Ups, 100 Push Ups, 100 Sit Ups. For hypertrophy, focus on rear deltoids, back extensors, hamstrings.
